description: Smallholder crop/land-cover type classification for Nandi County, Kenya from Sentinel-2/Sentinel-1 time series.
name: OlmoEarth Kenya Nandi crop type
notes: Existing olmoearth eval (nandi_base/mm/aef variants).

description: Cereal crop-type segmentation for staple Ethiopian crops from Sentinel-2 time series.
name: OlmoEarth Ethiopia crops
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Intercropping vs monocropping segmentation of Kenyan smallholder fields from Sentinel-2.
name: OlmoEarth Kenya intercropping
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; 3-class.

description: Fine-grained crop-type segmentation over Canadian farmland from Sentinel-2, derived from the AAFC Annual Crop Inventory.
name: OlmoEarth Canada crops (fine)
notes: 24 fine classes; coarse 9-class variant also available.

description: Agricultural parcel crop-type semantic segmentation over four regions of France (PASTIS benchmark).
name: OlmoEarth PASTIS
notes: Existing olmoearth eval (base/mm/ts variants).

description: Binary cropland vs non-cropland classification from 12-month Sentinel-2 time series, from ESA WorldCereal reference data.
name: OlmoEarth WorldCereal cropland
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; derived from the WorldCereal RDM in-situ reference.

description: Binary crop / not-crop mask for agricultural land in Africa from Sentinel-2.
name: OlmoEarth Africa crop mask
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Land-use/land-cover classification over an African Wildlife Foundation landscape in Kenya from 2023 imagery.
name: OlmoEarth AWF land use/land cover
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Maize vs non-maize smallholder field classification in Ethiopia from GPS-collected field points.
name: OlmoEarth Ethiopia maize
notes: Existing olmoearth_projects project.

description: Cropland (and maize) mapping in Togo from field-collected labels.
name: OlmoEarth Togo cropland
notes: Existing olmoearth_projects project.

description: Land-use/land-cover and crop-type segmentation over Mozambique provinces (Gaza, Manica, Zambezia).
name: OlmoEarth Mozambique LULC
notes: Existing olmoearth_projects project.

description: Tropical tree-crop / agroforestry segmentation over West Africa (cacao, oil palm, rubber and others).
name: OlmoEarth Tolbi agroforestry
notes: Existing rslearn project.

description: Agricultural field-boundary segmentation from Sentinel-2 (ingested FTW benchmark).
name: OlmoEarth Fields of the World
notes: Existing rslearn dataset; also available publicly on Source Cooperative.

description: ESA WorldCover 11-class land-cover segmentation from Sentinel-2 time series.
name: OlmoEarth WorldCover
notes: Existing eval; consider preferring the manual WorldCover/Geo-Wiki reference points (listed separately) over the map product.

description: Global land-cover segmentation from Sentinel-2, derived from the GLanCE product.
name: OlmoEarth GLanCE land cover
notes: The upstream GLanCE training set is manually photointerpreted (listed separately).

description: USGS LCMAP land-use segmentation over the United States from Sentinel-2.
name: OlmoEarth LCMAP land use
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Coastal/marine ecosystem-type segmentation of the Maldives using IUCN Global Ecosystem Typology classes.
name: OlmoEarth Maldives ecosystem mapping
notes: Existing rslearn project; broader global 'ecosystem' eval (110 classes) also exists.

description: Tree-genus segmentation across the United States (39 genera) from Sentinel-2 time series.
name: OlmoEarth US tree genus
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; 39 genera.

description: Oil-palm plantation type segmentation (industrial vs smallholder vs other) from Sentinel-2.
name: OlmoEarth Descals oil palm
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; from Descals et al. global oil palm.

description: Wildfire surface-fuel-model segmentation (29 classes) from Sentinel-2 time series over the US.
name: OlmoEarth surface fuels
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Mangrove vs water vs other classification from Sentinel-2 (and Sentinel-1).
name: OlmoEarth mangrove classification
notes: Existing olmoearth eval (base/mm/ts).

description: Dense seagrass vs background segmentation from Sentinel-2 with point supervision.
name: OlmoEarth seagrass
notes: Existing rslearn project (~40k point labels).

description: Solar-farm (photovoltaic) footprint segmentation from Sentinel-2 (and Sentinel-1).
name: OlmoEarth solar farm
notes: Existing olmoearth eval / Satlas.

description: Wind turbine detection from Sentinel-2 (and Sentinel-1) imagery.
name: OlmoEarth wind turbine
notes: Existing olmoearth eval / Satlas.

description: Offshore marine infrastructure detection (platforms and turbines) from Sentinel-2 (and Sentinel-1).
name: OlmoEarth marine infrastructure
notes: Existing olmoearth eval / Satlas.

description: Ship/vessel detection in Sentinel-2 imagery.
name: OlmoEarth Sentinel-2 vessels
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Ship/vessel detection in Sentinel-1 SAR imagery.
name: OlmoEarth Sentinel-1 vessels
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Vessel-type classification for detected vessels in Sentinel-2/Sentinel-1/Landsat crops.
name: OlmoEarth vessel attributes (type)
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; type-classification target (length is regression, excluded).

description: Classifies the driver of forest-loss events in the Amazon from pre/post Sentinel-2 imagery.
name: OlmoEarth forest loss driver
notes: Existing olmoearth eval; deployed as forest-loss.allen.ai.

description: Binary pre/post change classification detecting deforestation and urban expansion using two years of monthly Sentinel-2 mosaics.
name: OlmoEarth land-cover change (deforestation & urban expansion)
notes: Existing olmoearth evals lcc_deforestation and lcc_urban_expansion (with 3/4/6/12-month variants).

annotation_method: derived (NASA/IBM HLS Burn Scars, from MTBS)
description: Binary burn-scar segmentation from single-timestep HLS (Sentinel-2 + Landsat) imagery over the US.
name: OlmoEarth HLS burn scars
notes: Existing olmoearth eval.

description: Binary landslide-scar segmentation from Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2 and SRTM (pre/post event).
name: OlmoEarth landslide (Sen12Landslides)
notes: Existing rslearn project; from Sen12Landslides.

description: Largest harmonized open EU crop-type parcel dataset from national LPIS/CAP farmer declarations mapped to the HCAT taxonomy.
name: EuroCrops
notes: Strongest open source of vineyard/orchard/olive perennial-crop classes.

description: EU-wide in-situ ground survey of land cover and land use with field-recorded points, photos, and detailed crop types.
name: LUCAS Land Use/Cover Survey
notes: Gold-standard in-situ reference; 2018 and 2022 surveys within Sentinel-2 era.

description: Global harmonized dataset of ~95k georeferenced agricultural samples paired with Sentinel-1/2, DEM and climate, aggregating 20 source datasets.
name: CropHarvest
notes: Strong Africa/Asia coverage; 33k points have multiclass crop labels.

description: Global online repository of harmonized, curated in-situ crop-type and land-cover reference datasets with a unified crop legend.
name: WorldCereal Reference Data Module (RDM)
notes: Richest global crop reference repository; the source behind the WorldCereal maps.

description: Ground-surveyed crop-type labels for smallholder fields across four northern Indian states, paired with Sentinel-2.
name: AgriFieldNet India
notes: Smallholder South Asia geography.

description: Smallholder crop-type field labels from western Kenya collected in-situ via the PlantVillage app, with Sentinel-2 time series.
name: CV4A Kenya Crop Type
notes: Classic African smallholder benchmark (~4,000 fields). Classes corrected 2026-07-11 to the authoritative Documentation.pdf legend (3 pure + 4 intercrop mixes); the prior list (sugarcane/groundnut/sweet potato/sorghum) was not this dataset's taxonomy.

description: Crop-type field labels for Western Cape South Africa from government surveys, paired with Sentinel-1/2 time series.
name: South Africa Crop Type (Spot the Crop)
notes: Adds rooibos and wine-grape classes.

description: First smallholder crop-type semantic-segmentation dataset for Africa with Sentinel-1/2 and PlanetScope time series.
name: Crop Type in Ghana and South Sudan
notes: License corrected 2026-07-11 (README is CC-BY-SA-4.0, not CC-BY-4.0). NOTE: rejected as unusable — the Source Cooperative release strips georeferencing (randomized tile IDs + up to 3 km jitter), so labels can't be placed on the S2 grid.

description: Multi-sensor time-series dataset for paddy-dominant fields in the Cauvery Delta, India, annotated with crop type, phenology, variety and yield.
name: SICKLE
notes: Multi-resolution 3/10/30 m masks; paddy varieties.

description: Monthly ground-truth crop/land-use labels for ~1,854 fields in tropical western Bahia, Brazil, with Sentinel-1/2 and Landsat-8.
name: LEM+ (Brazil)
notes: Tropical double-cropping.

description: Annual 30 m crop-specific land-cover raster for the conterminous US with ~130 categories, trained on FSA ground data.
name: USDA Cropland Data Layer (CDL)
notes: Model product but many high-accuracy classes; sample confident/homogeneous pixels.

description: Time-series crop-type dataset of ~116k field instances over Zurich/Thurgau, Switzerland, with a 48-class hierarchical taxonomy.
name: ZueriCrop

description: National object-based crop-type ground truth for CONUS derived from Google Street View audits plus Sentinel-2 field boundaries.
name: CropSight-US
notes: 124k fields with per-field uncertainty; near-ground-survey quality.

description: High-resolution cocoa plantation map for West Africa trained on ~100k GPS-mapped cocoa field samples.
name: Cocoa Map (Côte d'Ivoire & Ghana)
notes: Adds cocoa class; prefer the GPS ground-truth samples over the derived map.

description: 10 m sugarcane maps for the top 13 producing countries (2019-2022), validated against field data.
name: Global Sugarcane 10 m
region: Global (Brazil, India, China, Thailand, and others)

description: 10 m rubber plantation map for Southeast Asia plus 30 m rubber-related deforestation year layer.
name: Rubber & Rubber-Related Deforestation (SE Asia)
notes: Adds rubber class.

description: Standardized field-scale crop/land-use polygons collected across seven tropical/subtropical countries under GEOGLAM/JECAM.
name: JECAM Harmonized In-Situ Datasets
region: Brazil, Burkina Faso, Kenya, Madagascar, Mali, Senegal, South Africa

description: 439k digitized smallholder crop-field boundary polygons across Vietnam and Cambodia with Sentinel-2 composites.
name: AI4SmallFarms
notes: Rare SE Asian smallholder field delineation.

description: Continent-wide crop-field boundary polygons (~42k) across Africa spanning 2017-2023.
name: Lacuna Fund Africa Crop Field Labels

description: ~1.9M globally distributed 30 m training units labeled by on-screen interpretation for the NASA MEaSUREs GLanCE product.
name: GLanCE Global Land Cover Training Data
notes: Manual reference behind the GLanCE product; prefer over the map.

description: Expert-interpreted global point reference set (~165k locations) used to train/validate CGLS-LC100 and ESA WorldCover.
name: Geo-Wiki Global 10 m Land Cover Reference (2015)
notes: The manual reference behind ESA WorldCover; prefer over the WorldCover map.

description: Over 5B human-labeled pixels on ~24k Sentinel-2 tiles worldwide for 10-class land use/land cover, with expert validation.
name: Dynamic World Expert Training Labels
notes: The manual training set behind the Dynamic World product.

description: ~400k co-registered Sentinel-1/2 patch pairs hand-labeled into 17 Local Climate Zones over 42+ global cities.
name: So2Sat LCZ42
notes: Adds local-climate-zone taxonomy.

description: Large multi-modal Sentinel-1+2 patch archive with CORINE multi-label land-cover annotations and pixel-level reference maps.
name: BigEarthNet v2 (reBEN)

description: High-resolution benchmark with manual 8-class land cover over 97 regions in 44 countries across 6 continents.
name: OpenEarthMap

description: 0.3 m semantic-segmentation dataset of urban and rural scenes across three Chinese cities for land cover / domain adaptation.
name: LoveDA

SOURCE_SUBSTITUTION: The LILA url points at the 2013/14 (pre-2016) 6-class product, which the Sentinel-era rule rejects. Approved 2026-07-11 to instead use the post-2016 USGS/CBP '2022 Edition' 13-class Land Cover (DOI 10.5066/P981GV1L, ScienceBase, 2017/18 epoch), which matches this entry's stated 2016-2022 time_range and LULC-variant note.
description: 1 m land cover for the US Chesapeake Bay watershed paired with NAIP, NLCD and Landsat, with detailed LULC variants.
name: Chesapeake Land Cover

description: Gaofen-2 imagery over China (>5B labeled pixels) with a fine 24-class land-use/land-cover scheme.
name: Five-Billion-Pixels / GID

classes: ~15 OSM land-use categories (residential, commercial, industrial, farmland, forest, grass, water, and more)
description: Sentinel-2 time-series patches with per-pixel land-use labels sourced from OpenStreetMap over 137k global cells.
name: OpenSentinelMap

description: Multi-sensor benchmark pairing aerial + Sentinel-1 + Sentinel-2 patches with tree species/genus/age labels from German forest inventory.
name: TreeSatAI Benchmark Archive
notes: Time-series variant (TreeSatAI-TS) adds full-year S1/S2.

classes: 13 classes / 18 species (oak, beech, fir, spruce, pine, chestnut, and more)
description: Aerial LiDAR and VHR imagery over 449 monospecific forests in southern France labeled by single tree species.
name: PureForest

description: Pixel-level Sentinel-2 time series labeled with dominant tree species from the German National Forest Inventory.
name: German National Tree Species (Sentinel-2 + NFI)

description: Global database of ~499k georeferenced individual-tree records with diameter, height and crown radius across 5,163 species.
name: Tallo
notes: Records are dated; filter to Sentinel-2 era.

description: National permanent field plots recording tree-level species, diameter and condition (~500k plots).
name: US Forest Inventory & Analysis (FIA)
notes: Public coordinates fuzzed ~1 mi for privacy.

description: Global vision-language dataset of 6.3M geolocated tree occurrences paired with Sentinel-2 time series and environmental variables.
name: GlobalGeoTree

description: Multiview (Street View + aerial) urban tree-genus benchmark from 23 North American city tree censuses.
name: Auto Arborist
notes: Urban tree genera; ~2.6M trees.

description: Global compilation of planted-forest and tree-crop polygons (oil palm, rubber, coffee, fruit, timber) from 82 countries.
name: SDPT v2 (Spatial Database of Planted Trees)

description: Annual wall-to-wall clear-cut deforestation increments mapped by expert visual interpretation of Landsat-class imagery.
name: PRODES (Brazilian Amazon deforestation)

description: Near-real-time alerts distinguishing clearcut, degradation, selective logging, mining and fire scars in Brazilian biomes.
name: DETER-B (near-real-time deforestation & degradation alerts)

description: Pan-tropical 30 m product tracking deforestation, degradation and regrowth of moist forests from Landsat.
name: JRC Tropical Moist Forest (TMF)

description: Landsat-8 patches of Indonesian primary-forest-loss events labeled with the direct deforestation driver by expert interpreters.
name: ForestNet
notes: Adds Indonesian driver classes distinct from Amazon-based forest_loss_driver.

description: Earth-observation patches of Cameroon forest-loss events labeled with detailed direct drivers.
name: Cam-ForestNet (Congo Basin drivers)

description: Near-real-time Sentinel-1 radar forest-disturbance alerts across the humid tropics at 10 m.
name: RADD Forest Disturbance Alerts
notes: SAR-based; complements optical deforestation labels.

description: Annual 30 m land-use/land-cover for all of Brazil (1985-2024) with detailed natural-vegetation classes.
name: MapBiomas Brasil (annual LULC)
notes: Adds Cerrado savanna and Brazilian ecosystem classes.

description: Global mapping of unfragmented, undisturbed forest landscapes and their reduction via photointerpretation.
name: Intact Forest Landscapes (IFL)

description: Global mangrove extent and change with a 10 m 2020 Sentinel-2 baseline and change series to 2023.
name: Global Mangrove Watch v4
notes: Global complement to internal mangrove classification.

description: Georeferenced points identifying mangrove genera by intertidal position, compiled from species-zonation literature.
name: Global Mangrove Genus Distribution
notes: Adds mangrove genus classes (finer than presence).

description: Detailed US wetland polygons classified with the full Cowardin hierarchy from photointerpretation.
name: US National Wetlands Inventory (NWI)

description: Global 30 m annual wetland map with eight fine subtypes from Landsat/Sentinel time series.
name: GWL_FCS30 Global Wetland Map (fine classes)

description: Global peatland extent polygons harmonized from best global/regional/national peat maps.
name: PEATMAP
notes: Static baseline; adds peatland class.

description: US interagency burn-severity and perimeter mapping of all large fires, from analyst-reviewed dNBR.
name: MTBS (Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity)
notes: Adds fire-severity classes (finer than binary burn scar).

description: Annual best-available fire-perimeter polygons combining agency perimeters and satellite delineation.
name: Canada NBAC (National Burned Area Composite)

description: Global 30 m annual burned-area maps from Landsat.
name: GABAM (Global Annual Burned Area Map)

description: Global 5 m maps of shallow coral-reef geomorphic zonation and benthic habitat, trained with extensive field photo-quadrats.
name: Allen Coral Atlas

description: Benchmark of georeferenced Sentinel-2 annotations distinguishing marine debris from co-occurring sea-surface features.
name: MARIDA (Marine Debris Archive)

description: Field-deployed artificial floating-plastic targets imaged by Sentinel-2 and UAS, providing precisely georeferenced reference spectra.
name: Plastic Litter Project (PLP)

description: Quarterly kelp-canopy area maps for the Americas' west coast from Landsat via spectral unmixing.
name: Kelpwatch (Landsat/Sentinel-2 kelp canopy)
notes: Floating Forests citizen-science kelp outlines are a manual alternative.

description: Landsat/Sentinel-based maps of coastal aquaculture (fish/shrimp) ponds across China and Southeast Asia.
name: Coastal Aquaculture Ponds (China & SE Asia)

description: Global 30 m maps of tidal-flat ecosystems from the Landsat archive using a globally distributed training set.
name: Murray Global Intertidal Change (tidal flats)

description: ~1,000 large Sentinel-1 SAR scenes with 220k+ georeferenced vessel/structure annotations for detecting non-broadcasting vessels.
name: xView3-SAR (dark vessel detection)
notes: Distinct fishing/non-fishing vessel classes and AIS-correlated attributes.

description: Global map of fixed offshore structures (oil, wind, other) detected from Sentinel-1 SAR, 2017-2024.
name: Global Fishing Watch SAR Fixed Infrastructure

description: Sentinel-1 SAR scenes matched with manually drawn operational ice charts (concentration, stage, form) plus AMSR2.
name: AI4Arctic / ASIP Sea Ice Dataset

description: Largest manually annotated Sentinel-2 snow-segmentation dataset (40 global scenes) for snow vs cloud/water/land.
name: Snow Coverage Mapping (Sentinel-2, manual)

description: Global set of manually delineated glacier outlines coordinated with GLIMS.
name: Randolph Glacier Inventory (RGI 7.0)

description: Multimodal benchmark for shallow-water bathymetry prediction and pixel-based seabed classification.
name: MagicBathyNet

description: 30 m maps of surface-water occurrence, change and seasonality (1984-2021) with a validated reference point set.
name: JRC Global Surface Water
notes: Use the manual validation/reference points to seed water/no-water samples.

description: Georeferenced Sentinel-1 (and coincident Sentinel-2) flood chips with hand-labeled flood and permanent-water masks across 11 global events.
name: Sen1Floods11
notes: Also present internally as presto eval; hand-labeled subset is high quality.

description: Sentinel-2 scenes paired with flood segmentation masks curated from Copernicus EMS across 500+ global events.
name: WorldFloods v2

description: Large manually annotated multi-temporal Sentinel-1 SAR flood dataset spanning 43 global flood events.
name: Kuro Siwo

description: Patches fusing Sentinel-2 optical with ALOS PALSAR slope/DEM for pixel-level landslide segmentation in four landslide-prone regions.
name: Landslide4Sense

description: Global point inventory of 11,000+ rainfall-triggered and other landslide events with dates and coordinates.
name: NASA Global Landslide Catalog / COOLR

description: ~850k manually annotated building polygons with pre/post-disaster imagery and a 4-level damage scale across 6 disaster types.
name: xBD / xView2 (building damage)
notes: VHR labels; co-locate with S2/S1 at event coords/dates. Covers hurricane, flood, wildfire, earthquake, volcano, tsunami.

description: Building-level war-destruction labels for Ukraine from UNOSAT VHR damage assessments paired with Sentinel-1 time series.
name: Ukraine War Damage (UNOSAT-derived)

description: 24 registered Sentinel-2 bitemporal image pairs with pixel-level urban-change ground truth.
name: OSCD (Onera Satellite Change Detection)

description: Daily 3 m PlanetFusion over 75 global AOIs with monthly pixel-wise 7-class land-cover labels for change segmentation.
name: DynamicEarthNet

description: Monthly 4 m PlanetScope over ~101 sites for two years with temporally-tracked building footprints.
name: SpaceNet 7 (multi-temporal buildings)
notes: Building density/settlement footprints discernible at 10 m.

description: Global 10 m binary settlement mask from 2019 Sentinel-1/2, validated with ~1M crowdsourced photointerpreted points.
name: World Settlement Footprint 2019
notes: Use the ~1M manual validation points to seed settlement/non-settlement samples.

description: ~68,600 utility-scale photovoltaic polygons from Sentinel-2/SPOT with manually verified test sets.
name: Global Solar PV Inventory (Kruitwagen et al.)
notes: Global PV complements internal Satlas solar_farm with different geography.

description: ~75k+ onshore/offshore wind-turbine points position-verified against aerial imagery, updated quarterly.
name: USWTDB (US Wind Turbine Database)
notes: High-quality manual point set with hub height/capacity/year.

description: Quarterly global inventory of 375k wind turbines and 86k PV installations from PlanetScope, 2017-2024, with construction dates.
name: Global Renewables Watch

description: ~35k power plants in 167 countries with coordinates, fuel type and capacity.
name: WRI Global Power Plant Database
notes: Adds power-plant-by-fuel classes.

classes: mining area (pits, tailings dams, waste rock, ponds, processing)
description: ~45k hand-digitized mining land-use polygons from Sentinel-2 visual interpretation across 135 countries.
name: Global Mining Polygons (Maus et al. v2)

description: Annual ML-detected polygons of artisanal/illegal gold-mine scars in Sentinel-2 across nine Amazonian countries.
name: Amazon Mining Watch
notes: Adds illegal-mining class.

description: Integrated database of oil & gas infrastructure features from official and academic sources.
name: OGIM (Oil & Gas Infrastructure Mapping)

description: Annual global gas-flaring catalog (location, temperature, volume) from VIIRS infrared detection.
name: VIIRS Nightfire Gas Flaring
notes: Adds gas-flaring class.

description: 62,671 brick kilns with oriented boxes across South Asia from Sentinel-2, by kiln type.
name: SentinelKilnDB
notes: Adds brick-kiln classes; non-commercial license.

description: First 10 m global map of plastic-covered greenhouses from Sentinel-2, 2020.
name: Global Plastic-Covered Greenhouses (Global-PCG-10)
notes: Adds greenhouse/plasticulture class.

description: Global dataset of maximum irrigation extent plus a dedicated center-pivot irrigation system layer.
name: GMIE Central Pivot Irrigation
notes: Center-pivot systems are visually distinctive at 10 m.

description: 10,434 expert-photointerpreted images of landfills and dumps in Lombardy, Italy, with masks.
name: AerialWaste (landfills)
notes: Large landfills visible at 10-30 m; adds waste-site class.

description: Expert-curated 7,320 large dams plus reservoir polygons with storage attributes.
name: GRanD (Global Reservoir and Dam Database)
notes: Reservoirs are visible at 10-30 m; GOODD adds ~38k dam points. SOURCE_SUBSTITUTION (approved 2026-07-11): standalone GRanD is discontinued/gated (SEDAC Earthdata login + GDW Google Form), so used its canonical successor GDW v1.0 (figshare 25988293, CC-BY-4.0, no credentials) SCOPED to GRanD-provenance records (ORIG_SRC=='GRanD', ~7,424) to avoid double-counting the separate GOODD dam dataset. Unified scheme: 0=background, 1=reservoir polygon, 2=dam point.

description: Hand-digitized road centerlines with type/speed attributes over multiple cities from 30 cm imagery.
name: SpaceNet 3/5 Roads
notes: Roads discernible at 10 m; DeepGlobe and GRIP4 add rural/global road coverage.

description: Community global point database of ~80k airports with runways and type classification.
name: OurAirports
notes: Airports/runways clearly visible at 10-30 m.

description: Human-validated dataset of concentrated animal feeding operations in California with footprints and animal-type labels.
name: Cal-FF (California CAFOs)
notes: Adds livestock-facility class.

description: Millions of geolocated plant (and animal) species occurrences pairable with Sentinel-2 patches, Landsat time series and climate rasters.
name: GeoLifeCLEF / GeoPlant
notes: Species presence points for habitat/context pretraining.

description: ~500,000 migratory ungulates detected in VHR imagery with released point data and sample masks.
name: Serengeti-Mara Wildebeest/Zebra Detections
notes: VHR-annotated locations; use for habitat/context, not direct detection at 10-30 m.

description: Breeding-colony abundance and colony-location polygons for six Antarctic penguin species from field and satellite guano-stain surveys.
name: Antarctic Penguin Biogeography / MAPPPD
notes: Guano stains detectable in Landsat/S2; colony footprints usable.

description: In-situ EU topsoil sampling with lab-measured physical/chemical properties at ~20,000+ georeferenced grid points.
name: LUCAS Topsoil
notes: Soil-property targets; can be binned into classes.

classes: soil moisture (continuous) + station metadata (land cover, climate, soil texture)
description: Harmonized, QC'd in-situ soil moisture from 2,500+ stations with fixed coordinates and time series.
name: ISMN (International Soil Moisture Network)

description: Global vector map of surface rock types with ~1.23M lithology polygons in a 3-level hierarchy.
name: GLiM (Global Lithological Map)
notes: Time-invariant surface geology; adds lithology classes.

description: Global point database of mineral deposits, mines and prospects with commodity and deposit-type attributes.
name: USGS MRDS (Mineral Resources Data System)

description: Landsat-derived fractional cover of ten rangeland components across western North America, trained from field plots.
name: RCMAP (Rangeland Condition Monitoring)
notes: Adds rangeland-component classes. Processed 2026-07-11 as REGRESSION with a single primary component = sagebrush cover (percent), since each label patch is single-band; the other fractional-cover components (bare ground, herbaceous, litter, ...) could each be added as separate regression datasets later. SOURCE: used the current MRLC 'Sagebrush 2015-2025' bundle (Sentinel-era years 2016/18/20/22/24) rather than the V7 1985-2024 release.

description: ~43,000 annually resolved polygon footprints of active permafrost thaw slumps across circum-arctic hotspots.
name: DARTS (Retrogressive Thaw Slumps)
notes: Adds permafrost-disturbance class.
source: NSF Arctic Data Center / Sci Data

description: Global 30 m classification of aeolian dune-pattern morphologies from Landsat and deep learning.
name: GSDP30 (Global Sand Dune Patterns)
notes: Adds dune-morphology classes.

description: 30 m random-forest maps of Cerrado savanna physiognomies at two hierarchical levels with ground samples.
name: Detailed Vegetation Maps of the Brazilian Cerrado
notes: Adds fine savanna-physiognomy classes.

description: 30 m fractional cover of invasive exotic annual grasses from HLS plus BLM-AIM field plots and ML.
name: USGS Exotic Annual Grass Fractional Cover
notes: Adds invasive-grass class.

description: Large crowd-sourced and agency database of georeferenced invasive-plant occurrences.
name: EDDMapS Invasive Species

description: ~4,934 georeferenced polygons of published archaeological tells/mounds in the southern Mesopotamian floodplain.
name: Mesopotamian Archaeological Sites (tells)
notes: Sites persistent; labels transfer to Sentinel-era imagery.

description: Sentinel-2 patch-classification benchmark of 27,000 geo-referenced images in 10 land-use/land-cover categories.
name: EuroSAT
notes: Also present internally as small_eurosat; listed for completeness.

description: Pixel-based dataset of >1.1M Sentinel-2 time series covering all of Austria for one agronomic year, with 16 crop types.
name: TimeSen2Crop

description: Multi-year, multi-country Sentinel-2 crop classification/segmentation benchmark from LPIS declarations in France and Catalonia.
name: Sen4AgriNet

description: Analysis-ready daily crop-monitoring benchmark for Brandenburg, Germany, combining Planet Fusion, Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 with CAP crop labels.
name: DENETHOR

classes: live fuel moisture content (%) by species
description: Global database of >280,000 field live-fuel-moisture measurements at >2,000 sites across 500+ species.
name: Globe-LFMC 2.0
notes: Also present internally as lfmc; global field reference.

description: Deep-learning global map of dominant tree-cover-loss drivers 2001-2024 with published interpreter train/validation label sets.
name: WRI/DeepMind Global Drivers of Forest Loss
notes: Prefer the interpreter train/validation points over the 1 km raster.

description: Global 10 m canopy height for 2020 fusing GEDI lidar and Sentinel-2 with per-pixel uncertainty.
name: ETH Global Canopy Height (Lang et al. 2023)
notes: Continuous regression target; included as a dense auxiliary label.

description: Balanced Sentinel-1 SAR patches labeled ship vs iceberg off Canada's east coast.
name: Statoil/C-CORE Iceberg Classifier
notes: Adds iceberg class from SAR.

description: In-situ cyanobacteria severity measurements across US water bodies paired with satellite imagery.
name: Tick Tick Bloom (HAB severity)
notes: Adds harmful-algal-bloom severity classes.

description: Multi-temporal Sentinel-2 crop/land-cover segmentation benchmark over a 102x42 km area north of Munich, Germany.
name: Munich480 / MTLCC
notes: Classic 2016 crop-SITS segmentation benchmark; adds German geography.

description: Anonymized national crop-parcel declarations for all of France, updated annually.
name: RPG France (Registre Parcellaire Graphique)
notes: Largest single-country LPIS, annual to 2024 (beyond EuroCrops snapshots).

description: ML-ready benchmark of per-parcel Sentinel-2 median time series for few-shot crop-type classification from EuroCrops.
name: EuroCropsML

description: Field-level crop-type reference polygons in Tanzania collected in-field via the Farmforce app, with Sentinel-2 growing-season imagery.
name: Great African Food Company Crop Type Tanzania

description: Quality-controlled georeferenced in-situ crop-type samples across smallholder wheat-based systems in Ethiopia.
name: Ethiopian Crop Type 2020 (EthCT2020)
notes: Distinct source/coverage from the internal ethiopia_crops eval.

description: Manually interpreted point/polygon reference samples (crop vs non-crop) collected via Collect Earth Online across African agro-ecological zones.
name: Digital Earth Africa Cropland Reference Data
notes: Prefer these reference samples over the derived cropland map.

description: AI-ready European field-boundary dataset (2.5M parcels, 7 countries) with 10 m Sentinel-2 monthly composites and 1 m orthophotos.
name: AI4Boundaries
region: Europe (AT, ES, FR, LU, NL, SI, SE)

description: Crowdsourced global reference database (~36,000 units) labeling cropland vs non-cropland via VHR visual interpretation.
name: Geo-Wiki Global Cropland Reference (See et al. 2017)

annotation_method: manual field (farmer smartphone photos + agronomist labels)
description: Georeferenced smallholder field photos and metadata (crop, management, phenology, damage) across Kenyan counties.
name: Eyes on the Ground (Kenya)

description: 10 m annual crop-type maps for Northeast China (maize, soybean, rice) from Sentinel-2, with reference samples.
name: NCCM (Northeast China Crop Map)

description: Standardized pan-European land-cover/land-use inventory from satellite imagery with a hierarchical 44-class nomenclature.
name: CORINE Land Cover

description: Independent, manually interpreted reference dataset of 8,360 plots recording annual land cover across the conterminous US.
name: Annual NLCD Reference Data
notes: Manual reference behind Annual NLCD; prefer over the map.

description: Combined crowdsourced global land-cover/land-use reference points at >100,000 unique locations.
name: Geo-Wiki Global Land Cover Reference (Fritz et al. 2017)

classes: 24 fine LCCS types across cropland, forest, shrubland, grassland, wetlands, impervious, bare, water, permanent ice/snow
description: Global validation sample set (~44,000) with 24 fine land-cover types, re-checked on Google Earth.
name: GLC_FCS30 Validation Samples

description: Country-scale French land-cover segmentation combining 0.2 m aerial imagery with Sentinel-2 time series.
name: FLAIR (French Land cover from Aerospace ImageRy)

description: Aerial ortho dataset of urban and rural Poland with masks for buildings, woodlands, water and roads.
name: LandCover.ai

description: 1.2-billion-pixel human-labeled library of coastal-environment imagery (Sentinel-2, Landsat-8, NAIP, UAS) for segmentation.
name: Coast Train

description: Field-plot inventory of Spanish forests with tree/plot species and measurements.
name: Spanish National Forest Inventory (IFN)

description: In-situ mapped and measured woody stems (species, location, size) in NEON field plots across the US.
name: NEON Woody Vegetation Structure

description: Individual tree-crown delineation and species classification from co-registered NEON RGB/LiDAR/hyperspectral.
name: IDTReeS

description: Harmonized spatial database of known primary/old-growth forests across 32 European countries.
name: European Primary Forest Database v2

description: Global 10 m map of the four EUDR forest types.
name: JRC Global Forest Types 2020 (GFT2020)

description: Global in-situ reference of aboveground biomass and canopy height from permanent field plots.
name: Forest Observation System

description: Validated deforestation-event polygons refined with ~3 m imagery to precisely delineate each event in space and time.
name: MapBiomas Alerta

description: Deep-learning-mapped forest road networks (logging/degradation proxy) from Sentinel-1+2 with opened month/year.
name: Congo Basin Forest Roads
notes: Adds forest-road / selective-logging-access class.

description: 10 m 2021 oil-palm extent plus a 30 m planting-year layer from Sentinel-1 and Landsat time series.
name: Descals Global Oil Palm Extent & Planting Year
notes: Adds oil-palm age dimension; distinct from the extent-only Descals eval.

description: ML-ready Sentinel-2 + MODIS dataset of 326 Greek wildfire events with expert-annotated burnt-area ground truth.
name: FLOGA

description: Pre/post-fire Sentinel-2 acquisitions of California wildfires with raster burned-area annotations from CAL FIRE.
name: CaBuAr (California Burned Areas)
notes: License corrected 2026-07-11: the dataset README is CDLA-Permissive-2.0 (the HF loader tag said OpenRAIL); both are permissive.

description: 500+ Sentinel-2 images of past wildfires from Copernicus EMS with severity and delineation masks.
name: CEMS Wildfire Dataset
notes: Adds burn-severity grading beyond binary burn scar.

description: Authoritative historical California wildland fire perimeter polygons, updated annually.
name: CAL FIRE FRAP Fire Perimeters

description: Multimodal Sentinel-1 SAR flood-delineation dataset with DEM and hydrography covering 95 flood events in 42 countries.
name: MMFlood

description: 65 globally distributed 100x100 km Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 triplets with quality-checked binary water masks.
name: S1S2-Water

description: Globally distributed Sentinel-2 L2A tiles with binary water/non-water labels for coastline and water-edge segmentation.
name: Sentinel-2 Water Edges Dataset (SWED)

description: VHR pre/post-flood imagery with building and road annotations flagged as flooded or not.
name: SpaceNet 8 (flooded roads & buildings)
notes: VHR labels; co-locate with S2/S1 at event coords/dates.

description: Community/expert dive-survey records of coral-reef benthic cover and indicator organisms at georeferenced sites worldwide.
name: Reef Check Global Reef Tracker

description: Spectral library and trained models for pelagic Sargassum detection from Sentinel-2/Landsat-8 with 10 m fractional-cover outputs.
name: Sargassum Detection & Fractional Cover ML Dataset
notes: Adds floating-macroalgae class in open ocean.

description: Spatially explicit dataset of finfish net-pen cages and bivalve/seaweed rafts identified from high-resolution and Sentinel imagery.
name: Global Marine Aquaculture (cages & rafts)
notes: Scope corrected 2026-07-11: the DOI-matched Zenodo release (reglab/aquaculture, rec 10933921) is French-Mediterranean FINFISH CAGES only — no bivalve/algae rafts and not global. Emitted a single finfish_cage class (37 manual-GT tiles + high-confidence YOLOv5 detections to reach ~553).

description: Sentinel-1 SAR image benchmark with pixel masks across five semantic classes for oil-spill segmentation.
name: Oil Spill Detection Dataset (Krestenitis / M4D)

description: Pixel-level Sentinel-2 ship-segmentation dataset over ports, straits and the Suez Canal.
name: S2-SHIPS
notes: Pixel-level ship masks complement the internal box-based vessel evals.

description: 9,941 georeferenced offshore wind infrastructure locations with quarterly deployment stages from Sentinel-1.
name: DeepOWT (Global Offshore Wind Turbines)

description: Global dataset of ~5,358 offshore oil/gas platform detections across six basins from Sentinel-1, with install/removal dates.
name: Global Offshore Oil & Gas Platforms

description: Multi-decadal satellite-derived shoreline positions and change rates from Landsat/Sentinel-2 for sandy coastlines.
name: CoastSat Satellite-Derived Shorelines
region: Pacific Rim, SE Australia, Atlantic Europe

description: Sentinel-2 semantic-segmentation of marine pollutants and sea-surface features including sediment-laden/turbid water and oil spill.
name: MADOS (Marine Debris and Oil Spill)
notes: Successor to MARIDA; adds discrete sediment-plume and oil masks.

description: Array-boundary polygons for all US ground-mounted PV facilities >=1 MW, digitized from aerial imagery.
name: USPVDB (US Large-Scale Solar PV Database)

description: Vectorized photovoltaic polygons across China for 2015 and 2020 from Landsat-8 with manual adjustment.
name: ChinaPV

description: 1,363 human-validated utility-scale solar-farm polygons across India.
name: AI Dataset for Solar Energy Locations in India

description: Researcher-curated inventory of >=10 MW onshore/offshore wind farms with geolocation, status and start year.
name: Global Wind Power Tracker

description: Global built-up surface and settlement-characteristics products including 10 m morphological zones.
name: GHSL Built-up Characteristics (GHS-BUILT-C)

description: 74,548 mining polygons finely contouring mine features from high-resolution imagery across 135 countries.
name: Global Mining Footprint (Tang & Werner)
notes: Classes corrected 2026-07-11: the released polygons carry NO per-feature-type attribute (only leftover KML placemark text), so the 6 fine mine-feature classes are not recoverable. Processed as a single binary mine/background segmentation.

description: Database of 1,800+ mine tailings storage facilities with company-disclosed risk attributes.
name: Global Tailings Portal

description: Expert-curated oil/gas well pads and storage tanks with basin-wide detections.
name: Stanford Well-Pad Dataset (DJ & Permian)
notes: Well pads 30-200 m, visible at 10 m.

description: Harmonized global vector roads (~21M km) with 5 road-type classes.
name: GRIP4 Global Roads Inventory
notes: Global road coverage complementing SpaceNet cities.

description: >38,000 dam-wall points digitized from Landsat/SPOT plus catchment polygons.
name: GOODD (Global Georeferenced Dams)
notes: Larger dam sample than GRanD.

description: Bitemporal VHR image pairs with manually annotated building-change masks.
name: LEVIR-CD / LEVIR-CD+

description: 5,000 bitemporal VHR side-looking image pairs with 65,920+ annotated building-change instances in rural areas worldwide.
name: S2Looking

description: Standardized legacy soil-profile point data (~200,000+ profiles, 170+ countries) with horizon-level properties and classification.
name: WoSIS Soil Profiles

description: Seamless geodatabase merging 48 US state geologic maps into geologic-unit polygons with standardized lithology.
name: USGS State Geologic Map Compilation (SGMC)

description: ~637,000 georeferenced mine features (shafts, adits, pits, quarries, tailings) digitized from historical topo maps.
name: USGS USMIN Mine Features

classes: 16 Arctic vegetation types (graminoid/dwarf-shrub/tussock-sedge tundras, wetlands, barrens)
description: Circumpolar tundra vegetation grouping >400 communities into 16 vegetation types.
name: Circumpolar Arctic Vegetation Map (CAVM)

classes: 33 waterbody/wetland types incl. bogs, fens, marshes, swamps
description: Harmonized global map of inland waters and wetlands in 33 types.
name: Global Lakes and Wetlands Database (GLWD) v2

description: Supraglacial-lake polygon boundaries over two NE Greenland glaciers during summer melt from Sentinel-2.
name: Supraglacial Lakes, Northeast Greenland
notes: Native S2 10 m; adds supraglacial meltwater class.

description: Continent-scale inventory of ~10,500 supraglacial lakes and channels for January 2017.
name: Supraglacial Lakes & Channels, West Antarctica

description: Benchmark of 681 SAR images of marine-terminating glaciers with manually annotated calving fronts and zone masks.
name: CaFFe (Calving Fronts and where to Find thEm)
notes: Multi-mission SAR incl. Sentinel-1; adds calving-front and ice-mélange classes.

description: Compiled, QC'd, manually digitized terminus traces for Greenland marine-terminating glaciers.
name: TermPicks (Greenland glacier termini)

description: Dense inter/intra-annual time series of >19,400 automatically extracted Antarctic calving-front positions from Sentinel-1.
name: IceLines (Antarctic ice-shelf & glacier fronts)

description: Annual surface-damage maps over nine Antarctic ice shelves mapping crevasses, rifts and fractured areas from Landsat.
name: Antarctic Ice-Shelf Surface Damage (crevasses/rifts)
notes: Native Landsat 30 m; adds crevasse/rift classes.

description: Multi-operator consensus rock-glacier inventory across 12 regions worldwide combining geomorphology with InSAR moving areas.
name: RGIK Rock Glacier Inventories (RoGI)
notes: Adds rock-glacier / permafrost-creep classes.
region: 12 regions worldwide (Alps, Andes, Alaska, Central Asia)

description: Inventory of 44,273 rock glaciers across the Tibetan Plateau as footprint polygons + primary-marker points.
name: TPRoGI (Tibetan Plateau Rock Glacier Inventory)

description: Global, manually corrected supraglacial debris-cover maps per RGI region.
name: Global Debris-Covered Glaciers (Herreid & Pellicciotti)
notes: Adds debris-covered-glacier class.

description: Antarctic-wide blue/bare-ice-area outlines and per-pixel presence from a CNN, with manually outlined training regions.
name: Blue Ice Areas of Antarctica (Tollenaar et al.)
notes: Adds blue-ice class (spectrally distinct).

description: Annual 30 m glacial-lake polygon inventory for High Mountain Asia with expert refinement.
name: Hi-MAG Glacial Lakes (High Mountain Asia)

description: Global inventory of 3,151 glacier lake outburst flood events with point locations plus manually mapped lake polygons.
name: Global GLOF Database

description: 18,737 manually mapped avalanche outline polygons from an extreme January 2018 acquisition.
name: SPOT6 Avalanche Outlines (Swiss Alps)
notes: Adds snow-avalanche class; large debris tongues discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Circum-Antarctic iceberg outline polygons with geometric/mass attributes from Sentinel-1 SAR.
name: Circum-Antarctic Icebergs (Sentinel-1)

description: Deep-learning detection of >1 billion individual ice-wedge polygons across the pan-Arctic, classified by microtopography.
name: Pan-Arctic Ice-Wedge Polygons
notes: Use rasterized density at S2/Landsat scale; adds patterned-ground class.

description: Pan-Arctic vector map of the ice-rich Yedoma permafrost domain (~2.59M km2) with confidence classes.
name: Yedoma Permafrost Database (IRYP v2)
notes: Yedoma uplands have characteristic thermokarst texture.

description: ~161,300 thermokarst lakes/ponds mapped from Sentinel imagery at 10 m.
name: Thermokarst Lakes & Ponds, Qinghai-Tibet Plateau
notes: Native 10 m; adds periglacial-waterbody class.

description: 30 m snow melt-out date rasters for the Pyrenees, Alps and Caucasus from Landsat time series.
name: Snow Melt-Out Date, European Mountains (30 m)

annotation_method: derived (Sentinel-1 SAR; validated vs snow pillows)
description: Global 80 m raster of snowmelt runoff onset from Sentinel-1 backscatter minima, MODIS-constrained.
name: Global Snowmelt Runoff Onset (Sentinel-1)

description: Continental InSAR ground-displacement dataset with per-point line-of-sight and vertical/horizontal velocities from Sentinel-1.
name: EGMS (European Ground Motion Service)
notes: Native 20x5 m; strongest ground-motion source. Adds subsidence/uplift classes.

description: Global homogenized database of active fault traces with kinematics and slip-rate attributes.
name: GEM Global Active Faults Database
notes: Static features; adds fault/lineament classes.

description: Unified worldwide database of mapped coseismic surface-rupture traces and slip for 50 earthquakes.
name: SURE 2.0 (Worldwide Surface Ruptures)

description: Authoritative catalog of Holocene/Pleistocene volcanoes with coordinates, type and eruptive histories.
name: Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program
notes: Adds volcano-type classes; edifices discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Worldwide catalog of 630+ collapse calderas with location, age, structure and eruption details.
name: Collapse Caldera Database (CCDB)
notes: Calderas km-scale; clearly discernible.

description: Digitized polygon shapefiles of mapped individual lava-flow extents at Kilauea, Hawaii.
name: USGS Kilauea Lava Flow Shapefiles
notes: Fresh flows very discernible in S2/Landsat SWIR.

description: Definitive catalog of ~190 confirmed terrestrial impact structures with coordinates, diameter and age.
name: Earth Impact Database
notes: Filter to larger structures; only ~190 total.

description: Inventory of closed depressions (sinkholes) extracted from 10 m elevation across US karst regions.
name: USGS Closed Depressions in Karst Regions
notes: Filter by area; larger sinks discernible. Adds karst/sinkhole class.

description: Pan-European inventory of 3,116 verified gully-erosion locations from LUCAS 2022, plus a probability map.
name: GE-LUCAS Gully Erosion (EU)
notes: Adds gully-erosion class with manual points.

description: Country-driven global map of salt-affected soils harmonized from 257,419 measured observations.
name: FAO GSASmap (Salt-Affected Soils)
notes: Adds soil-salinity classes.

description: LiDAR-derived polygon inventory of alluvial fans, high-angle fans and debris fans across Colorado (>3,200 fans).
name: Colorado Alluvial & Debris Fan Mapping
notes: Adds alluvial-fan landform class.

description: First fine-grained global dataset of manually annotated agricultural terrace parcels (>200,000 parcels).
name: GTPBD (Global Terraced Parcel and Boundary Dataset)
notes: Terraced hillslopes clearly visible at 10-30 m; adds agricultural-terrace class.

description: USGS geodatabase of manually digitized salar outlines plus lithium brine/pegmatite occurrence points and facilities.
name: Salars of the Lithium Triangle (USGS)
notes: Salars km-scale; adds salar / lithium-brine classes.

description: Digital maps of hydrothermal alteration type, key mineral groups and green vegetation from ASTER across the western US.
name: USGS ASTER Hydrothermal Alteration Maps
notes: Native 30 m; alteration discernible in S2/Landsat SWIR.

description: Global inventory of ~11,000 river deltas classified by river/wave/tide dominance with land/water change.
name: Global Delta Dataset
notes: Adds delta landform/morphology classes.

description: ~1,800 expert-labeled coastal transect samples classifying sediment, landform type, built environment and defenses.
name: CoastBench
notes: Best manual coastal-type fit; cliffs/dunes/plains discernible at 10-30 m.

description: 10 m raster of all Finnish peatlands separating undrained mires, forestry-drained peatlands, agricultural organic soils and peat-production areas.
name: GTK National Peatland Dataset (Finland)
notes: Native 10 m; adds peat-extraction / drained-peatland classes.

description: Global 10 m Sentinel-2 semantic classification of river water, lake water and exposed sediment/gravel bars (~8.9M bars).
name: Global River Gravel Bars (Carbonneau & Bizzi)
notes: Native S2 10 m; adds fluvial sediment-bar class.

description: Expert hand-labeled river vs non-river surface-water masks over 1,145 scenes, co-registered with Sentinel-2 and SWORD.
name: RiverScope
notes: Strong manual river-masking fit with Sentinel-2. License corrected 2026-07-11 (Zenodo record 15376394 is CC-BY-4.0, not CC0-1.0).

description: Global lake polygons and multi-decadal area change for ~3.4M lakes >0.03 km2, with U-Net training labels.
name: GLAKES

description: 30 m annual inter/intra-annual open surface-water dynamics from the full Landsat archive with a manually interpreted reference sample.
name: GLAD Global Surface Water Dynamics
notes: Captures seasonal inundation dynamics.

description: 7,572 curated in-situ hyperspectral reflectance spectra with co-located chlorophyll-a, TSS, CDOM and Secchi depth.
name: GLORIA (Global hyperspectral water quality)
notes: Water-quality match-up truth; adds turbidity/clarity/chlorophyll targets.

description: NASA archive of in-situ ocean-color match-ups (chlorophyll-a, pigments, reflectance) worldwide.
name: SeaBASS (NASA ocean color in-situ)

description: Consensus outlines of surface giant kelp from millions of citizen-science Landsat classifications.
name: Floating Forests Global Kelp Canopy
notes: Manual kelp-canopy alternative to Kelpwatch.

classes: K. brevis cell abundance / bloom category
description: In-situ georeferenced marine HAB observations (primarily Karenia brevis red tide) with cell counts.
name: HABSOS (Harmful Algal BloomS Observing System)
notes: Marine HAB match-up truth.
region: Gulf of Mexico + SE US coast

description: Manually interpreted Sentinel-1 SAR patches with oil slicks plus a large look-alike set.
name: Oil Slicks & Look-Alikes (E. Mediterranean SAR)
notes: Sentinel-1 ~10 m; distinct from standard oil-spill benchmarks.

description: Large global benchmark of Sentinel-2 patches with hand-crafted pixel labels for thick/thin cloud and cloud shadow.
name: CloudSEN12
notes: Native S2 10 m; adds cloud/shadow atmospheric classes.

description: Several thousand Landsat-8 scenes with pixel-level manual contrail annotations at 30 m thermal resolution.
name: Human-Labeled Landsat-8 Contrails Dataset
notes: Landsat-8 30 m IR is the best-fit sensor for contrails.

description: Hand-annotated methane super-emitter plume masks on Sentinel-2 imagery for automated monitoring.
name: CH4Net (methane super-emitter plumes)
notes: Sentinel-2 10-20 m; best-fit methane-plume set for this sensor family. License corrected 2026-07-11: HF dataset av555/ch4net is CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 (NonCommercial-NoDerivatives; only the AMT paper text is CC-BY-4.0). NoDerivatives is in tension with generating/redistributing derived label rasters — may warrant license-based rejection even if access is granted. Also gated (needs-credential).

description: Sentinel-1 SAR lake-ice/water semantic segmentation over Swiss Alpine lakes with pixel-wise ground truth.
name: Sentinel-1 Lake Ice Detection
notes: Sentinel-1 SAR 10 m; adds lake-ice class.

annotation_method: satellite fusion anchored by ground cameras
description: 30 m green-up/senescence transition-date product fusing Harmonized Landsat-Sentinel with PhenoCam time series.
name: HP-LSP (HLS-PhenoCam Land Surface Phenology)
notes: Native 30 m; adds land-surface-phenology targets.

description: Global 10 m annual canola maps exploiting the distinctive flowering signal in Sentinel-1/-2.
name: RapeseedMap10 (Canola Bloom)
notes: Adds flowering-event (canola bloom) class.

description: Near-surface camera phenology (green-chromatic-coordinate series, transition dates) from the global PhenoCam network.
name: PhenoCam Network v3

description: ~100k expert pastoralist ground labels of forage/vegetation condition paired with 30 m Landsat-8 imagery.
name: Drought Watch (Kenya forage condition)
notes: Adds forage/drought-stress class at 30 m.

description: Harmonized georeferenced polygons of wind/tornado-damaged forest stands across Europe.
name: FORWIND (European forest wind disturbance)
notes: Adds windthrow/storm-blowdown class.

description: ~20,000 Landsat-grid plots manually interpreted for disturbance timing, severity and agent across Europe.
name: European Forest Disturbance Reference (Senf & Seidl)

description: 10 m raster of spruce bark-beetle disturbance from Sentinel-2 change detection, field-validated.
name: Bark Beetle Disturbance, Pokljuka (Slovenia)
notes: Native 10 m; adds bark-beetle die-off class.

description: Global database of cm-scale drone/aerial orthophotos with expert annotations of standing dead vs live tree cover.
name: deadtrees.earth (standing deadwood)
notes: Deadwood fractional cover predictable at 10 m.

description: Pan-European field survey of crown defoliation, discoloration, dieback and damage cause on a 16x16 km plot grid.
name: ICP Forests Crown Condition
notes: Adds forest-health / defoliation classes.

description: Pan-European harmonized layer of hedgerows, tree rows and small woody patches from VHR imagery.
name: Copernicus HRL Small Woody Features
notes: Adds hedgerow / small-woody-feature class.

description: Harmonized pan-European parcel polygons of olive-grove plantations from national LPIS/GSAA.
name: EU Olive Groves (Soil O-live)
notes: Adds olive-grove tree-crop class.
region: Mediterranean Europe (HR, FR, GR, IT, PT, SI, ES)

description: Field/aerial-verified points labeling parcels as natural vs artificial grassland plus a 10 m raster.
name: Natural Grasslands of France
notes: Adds natural-vs-improved grassland distinction.

description: ~197,830 georeferenced field points from 37 tundra campaigns with plant functional-type cover.
name: SATFiD (Synthesized Alaskan Tundra Field Database)
notes: Adds tundra plant-functional-type classes (field-based).

description: Global georeferenced biocrust occurrence/cover records with dominant-group composition.
name: Global Biocrust Distribution Database
notes: Adds biological-soil-crust class.

description: 446 georeferenced field plots with peatland type, Sphagnum/graminoid/shrub/tree cover and reflectance.
name: Peatland Vegetation Spectral Library (Finland & Estonia)
notes: Adds bog-vs-fen peatland vegetation classes.

description: Point-based seagrass species composition and percent cover from ~3,000 manually interpreted photo-transect images.
name: Moreton Bay Seagrass Species & Cover
notes: Adds seagrass-species classes (finer than presence).

annotation_method: ML classification of S1/2 time series
description: Annual 10 m cropland-activity maps plus abandonment/reclamation/fallow layers from Sentinel-1/2, with sample points.
name: ARCC10-IM (Abandoned & Reclaimed Cropland, Inner Mongolia)
notes: Adds cropland-abandonment / reclamation classes.

description: 30 m annual paddy-rice maps plus a DL training set from field-survey GPS samples.
name: Long-history Paddy Rice, Northeast China
notes: Flood-irrigated paddy (methane-relevant); field provenance.

annotation_method: RS algorithm calibrated with transect surveys
description: Remote-sensing-derived annual adoption of conservation tillage, residue cover and winter cover crops across US croplands.
name: OpTIS (Operational Tillage Information System)
notes: Adds tillage/cover-crop practice classes (aggregated; use as priors).

description: Global annual cloud-free radiance composites, the standard economic-activity/electrification proxy.
name: VIIRS Nighttime Lights (Annual VNL V2)
notes: ~500 m; bin radiance into classes. Adds electrification/activity proxy.

description: Cluster-level DHS/LSMS asset-wealth labels pre-matched to Landsat and nightlights.
name: SustainBench Poverty (Asset Wealth Index)
notes: Bundled 255x255 Landsat patches; adds wealth/poverty targets.

description: Global rural-urban classification via the UN Degree of Urbanisation methodology.
name: GHS-SMOD (Degree of Urbanization)
notes: Adds rural-urban gradient classes.

description: Dasymetric gridded population counts/density from a random-forest model.
name: WorldPop Global Population Density
notes: 100 m; bin into density classes.

description: Settlement polygons from building footprints classed by settlement type across Sub-Saharan Africa.
name: GRID3 Settlement Extents
notes: Clean 3-way settlement-type target discernible at 10-30 m.

classes: population count per 1 km (discrete class bins)
description: Sentinel-2 + nightlights + LCZ paired with gridded population classes for 98 EU cities.
name: So2Sat POP (Population Estimation)
notes: Ships S2 10 m patches directly.

description: Most comprehensive global marine and terrestrial protected-area boundaries with management attributes.
name: World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA)
notes: Legal boundaries (not land-cover boundaries).

description: Most comprehensive global coral-reef locations (presence polygons + points).
name: UNEP-WCMC Global Warm-Water Coral Reefs
notes: Larger reef complexes discernible in shallow-water optical.

description: Global compilation of >6,000 sea-turtle nesting records across >3,000 beaches for all species.
name: SWOT Sea Turtle Nesting Sites
notes: Nesting beaches discernible at 10-30 m; individuals not.

description: Downloadable seabird breeding-colony locations and populations across the Arctic and N. Pacific.
name: Seabird Colony Registers (Circumpolar & N. Pacific)
notes: Colony islands/cliffs/guano-stained ground discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Herd-extent polygons at walrus haulouts interpreted from optical + SAR satellite (incl. Sentinel-2/Sentinel-1).
name: Pacific Walrus Coastal Haulouts
notes: Large aggregations/haulout sites discernible at 10-30 m in S2.

description: ~31,000 livestock enclosures (bomas/enkangs), ~40,000 km fencing, and agricultural land from manual VHR digitization.
name: landDX (Kenya-Tanzania Borderlands)
notes: Bomas 30-150 m cleared enclosures discernible at 10-30 m; adds pastoral-structure class.

description: Global irrigation-canal centerlines from OSM refined by ML to separate agricultural canals.
name: GRAIN (Global Registry of Agricultural Irrigation Networks)
notes: Large canals/aqueducts discernible; adds canal/waterway class.

description: 58,502 wastewater treatment plants with capacity, population served, treatment level and outfall.
name: HydroWASTE (Global Wastewater Treatment Plants)
notes: Aeration/settling ponds readily discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Global cement plants with location, ownership, status and capacity.
name: GEM Global Cement and Concrete Tracker
notes: Kilns/silos/clinker storage clearly discernible.

classes: steel/iron plant (BF, EAF, BOF, DRI furnaces)
description: Every crude iron/steel plant >=500 kt/yr with furnace-level detail and coordinates.
name: GEM Global Iron and Steel Tracker
notes: Very large complexes, clearly discernible.

description: Multitemporal Sentinel-2 benchmark of extraction sites including distinct large-quarry and non-metallic subsets.
name: EuroMineNet (Sentinel-2 Mining/Quarry Benchmark)
notes: Native 10 m; adds quarry/aggregate-pit class.

description: Crowdsourced global human-made solar salt evaporation/production ponds.
name: OpenStreetMap Salt Ponds / Salt Works
notes: Large geometric pond complexes clearly discernible (distinct from natural salars).

description: Official annual coca-cultivation density grids/area layers from UNODC-Colombia SIMCI.
name: Colombia SIMCI Coca Monitoring
notes: Best public georeferenced coca source; high-density cells as weak coca labels.

description: Confirmed Amazonian earthworks (geoglyphs, ring ditches, mound villages) plus a predictive probability model.
name: Pre-Columbian Earthworks in Amazonia
notes: Geoglyphs/ring ditches 100-300 m; discernible at 10-30 m.

description: ~4,147 Iron/Bronze Age hillforts with coordinates and detailed attributes.
name: Atlas of Hillforts of Britain and Ireland
notes: Large enclosed earthwork ramparts (1-20+ ha) discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Georeferenced, time-stamped annotations across 62 functional land-use classes matched to Sentinel-2.
name: fMoW-Sentinel (Functional Map of the World)
notes: Large functional classes (golf, stadium, prison, port, race track) discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Global crowdsourced polygons/POIs for fine-grained leisure and tourism land-use classes.
name: OpenStreetMap Leisure/Tourism Extracts
notes: Golf courses, stadiums, marinas, large cemeteries, ski pistes discernible at 10-30 m.

description: Authoritative satellite-derived per-structure damage assessments across conflict zones (Ukraine, Gaza, Syria, Iraq).
name: UNOSAT Conflict Damage Assessments
notes: Aggregate to heavily-damaged zones for 10-30 m; complements xBD/Ukraine.

name: OlmoEarth Ecosystem Atlas IUCN EFG (10m)
notes: IUCN Ecosystem Functional Group presence points at 10 m; all coded points kept (no cap).

name: OlmoEarth Ecosystem Atlas IUCN EFG (100m)
notes: IUCN Ecosystem Functional Group presence points at 100 m; all coded points kept (no cap).

name: Global Renewables Watch (wind turbines)
notes: Presence-only wind-turbine points; solar PV polygons are the global_renewables_watch dataset.

annotation_method: digitized from historical USGS topo maps
name: USGS USMIN Mine Features (points)
notes: Presence-only point mine markers (prospect pit / shaft / adit / etc.); polygon footprints are the usgs_usmin_mine_features dataset.
